info.name: Gatka Association India BE
info.description: API collection (baseUrl includes `/api`). Rate limits: 429 with `code: RATE_LIMITED`. Auth routes use stricter limits; R2 upload/presign are public with upload rate limits. After **Auth → Me**, `userId` is set on the collection for user-scoped calls (e.g. attendance). Set `competitionId` / `campId` where needed for attendance and competitions.

exec: const payload = j.data !== undefined && j.data !== null ? j.data : j;

item.name: POST — bulk add districts under state
Attendance
item.description: Mark attendance: roles COACH, TRAINING_CENTER, DISTRICT_ADMIN, STATE_ADMIN, NATIONAL_ADMIN. `date` is ISO calendar date `YYYY-MM-DD`. Types: TOURNAMENT (optional `competitionId`), CAMP (optional `campId`), TC_DAILY (optional `trainingCenterId` for a player at a TC). Competition summary: DISTRICT_ADMIN, STATE_ADMIN, NATIONAL_ADMIN only.

item.name: Competitions — aggregate results
item.description: Organization-level 1st/2nd/3rd by competition level: DISTRICT → training centers, STATE → districts, NATIONAL → states. One winner in firstPlace; secondPlace and thirdPlace are arrays (ties).

item.name: Settings — PATCH membership expiry date (super national)
Settings — PATCH role payment fees (national admin)
